title: Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series - Cross Country Carbon Market Overview
content:
## Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series - Cross Country Carbon Market Overview
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to the next session of our exclusive Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series. This session will explore a cross country carbon market overview. The panel will discuss carbon pricing and markets trends in carbon market transactions. Speakers:
- Kimberly Howard , Partner, Energy, Infrastructure and Environmental Group
- Thomas McInerney , Partner, Business Law and Energy and Resources Group
- Cindy Vaillancourt , Partner, Business Law and Environmental Group
Note : The presentation will be given in English only. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. For information about this seminar, please email clientevents@mccarthy.ca . This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
12:00 p.m. – 1:30 p.m. (ET) 10:00 a.m. – 11:30 a.m. (MT) 9:00 a.m. – 10:30 a.m. (PT)
